rotation.interpretation: 51.4% rotated from our phoneme axes — halfway between our projection and the true basis
rotation.megethos_confirmed: PC1 = 0.99*complexity. Megethos IS a true axis.
rotation.rank_spread: Bathos (rank) appears in axes 2-5. Not a single axis — it is DISTRIBUTED across the true geometry.

curvature_test.note: Barely flat. Some domain pairs are nearly orthogonal (EC<->SG: 89 deg). The geometry is flat globally but domains see different projections.

clusters.note: MF/Dirichlet/lattices/materials share a viewpoint (8-34 deg). EC/NF/ec_zeros share another (58-72 deg). Genus2 and SG are outliers.
